prestazioni: EG33 3.3L flat-six engine: Full forged internals with JE Pistons 9.2:1 compression forged pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 9,000 RPM reliability. Pair with a custom-tuned Haltech Elite 2500 ECU to optimize the factory dual-plenum intake and individual throttle bodies (ITBs) for 350+ WHP on E85.

Turbocharged conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 equal-length header and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a GReddy Profec boost controller for 18 PSI of boost. Intercooled with a custom front-mount intercooler from PWR with a 4-inch core and dual 3.5-inch piping.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the SVX's 50/50 weight distribution), Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from Whiteline for the rear trailing arms and subframe. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 6-pot front calipers with 356mm rotors and 4-pot rear calipers with 330mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem SVX-specific widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. The kit includes extended front fenders by 2 inches and rear fenders by 3 inches to accommodate the 9.5-inch front and 11-inch rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels in 18x9.5 +35 and 18x11 +40 fitment, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear).

Custom carbon fiber hood with a functional dual-scoop design to feed the front-mount intercooler, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber trunk lid. Full custom rear wing based on the 964 Porsche GT2 design, fabricated from carbon fiber and mounted on custom aluminum pedestals for adjustable angle of attack.

Interior rework with Bride Zeta III bucket seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, mounted on custom bolt-in subframes. Full custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK with a 6-point design and integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Dashboard and center console wrapped in Alcantara with custom carbon fiber gauge pods for a Haltech digital dash and AEM wideband gauge.
